heroTitle: The exam has a shape. Learn the shape.
heroSub: Every FODL exam from 2020–2024 follows the same three-question template. This hub is built from your course's 9 lectures and all 12 past exams — translated, tagged, and drillable.
examFormatLine: 3 hours · no aid material · 3 questions · ~105 points

slotRoles.Expressiveness: Q1 · what can the network represent
slotRoles.Optimization: Q2 · gradient flow gets you there
slotRoles.Generalization: Q3 · why it works on unseen data
